'''âdh-h-v-zh''' ('''kadhahvezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:focus|focus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focus|focus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-h-v-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhahvezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhahvezhoko|thidhahvezhoko]] || [[word:jidhahvezhoko|jidhahvezhoko]] || [[word:shidhahvezhoko|shidhahvezhoko]] || [[word:kidhahvezhoko|kidhahvezhoko]]
